description: Install dependencies and verify baseline build passes
steps: Run 'npm install' in /projects/sandbox/cdk-serverless to install all dependencies
Run 'npx projen compile' to verify TypeScript compilation passes
Run 'npx jest --passWithNoTests' to verify existing tests pass
acceptance_criteria: npx projen compile completes without TypeScript errors
npx jest passes all existing tests
findings: All 24 tests pass across 6 test suites. Deprecation warnings exist for aws-cdk-lib.aws_appsync.GraphqlApiProps#schema (should use Definition.schema) but these are non-blocking. npm install reports 9 vulnerabilities (2 low, 5 moderate, 2 high) but these are pre-existing and do not affect build/test.
